summaries.title: VPS RAM Orchestrator Worker — multi-layer RAM pressure management with worker pausing and task deferral
summaries.summary: The VPS RAM Orchestrator Worker implements multi-layer RAM pressure management by separating sensing (RAMMonitor), policy (RAMScheduler), and actuation (WorkerPauseManager) into independent modules. A 4-state state machine with hysteresis prevents oscillation, while worker criticality levels enable graceful degradation by pausing non-essential workers based on RAM pressure severity. This modular architecture allows each layer to be tested and replaced independently.
